subject: Mozi Minute: My Favorite Upsell Of All Time
body:
Words I like: If you make it easy for people to buy, more people will.

Mozi Minute: My favorite upsell of all time

Most business owners try to upsell by asking, "Do you want the premium version?"

This gives an easy out. And invites objections.

My favorite upsell of all time is the menu upsell. Here's why:

- It removes the yes/no decision
- You don't pitch, you prescribe
- The close is frictionless

How it works:

- Unsell what they don't need. This builds instant trust and reciprocity.
- Prescribe what they do need. Tell them what they need with detailed personalized instruction.
- Ask if they prefer A or B (nudge to one option).
- Make it easy to pay. My favorite: "card on file?"

Example (supplements):

- Unsell - "Since you're trying to lose weight you don't need the mass gainer or testosterone booster."
- Prescribe - "But you will need the pre workout. Take this everyday 30 minutes before heading to the gym."
- A/B - "For the pre workout did you want cherry or lime? I prefer cherry."
- Easy to pay - "Did you just want to use the card on file for that?"

As promised, value in under a minute.

Talk soon,

- Alex
